name: Frozen Soy Cream
recipeIngredient: 2 cups vanilla or carob soy milk
1 heaping tablespoon Wax Orchards peanut-butter fudge sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the soy milk into a blender.
2. Add the date sugar and mix thoroughly.
3. Stir in the Wax Orchards peanut-butter fudge sauce.
4. Transfer the mixture to an ice cream maker and freeze according to manufacturer's directions.
Note on Wax Orchards fudge sauce: This product is very low in fat, with virtually no fat for the fudge variant. It is sweetened with fruit juices. You can find it at health food stores, gourmet stores, or order it directly from Wax Orchards (800) 634-6132. The recipe will be as low-fat as the soy milk used; using higher-fat soy milk like WestSoy Lite (2 g fat per cup) results in a creamier product.
